title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Flexspace IT Solution Limited
body: "Application number 5110  Applicant Flexspace No2 LLP objected to the name used by Flexspace IT Solution Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 27 February 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Flexspace IT Solution Limited is changed to 15565018, LTD. "
